title: Database corruption following an I/O error on xShmLock
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR NOT NULL, value DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
UPDATE test_table SET value = NULL WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = 'Sample');
key_bug_features: I/O error on xShmLock causing database corruption
